creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Your use of INSTALL_DATA vs INSTALL_LIB is still wrong.  The other issues I raised are still not addressed.  Why do you continue to not fix the issues that were raised?  Also please note that I am asking you questions because I am interested in your answers.  You have so far not answered most of the questions I asked.  It is hard for me to continue if you do not answer the questions I ask you.

Please understand that I am doing this as a volunteer.  My time to review ports is limited and your patch has already taken a lot of this limited time as you keep submitting new revisions that have not fixed the issues I have raised with your previous patches.  If you keep doing this I must drop this patch and leave it for someone else to review.
